title: K-200 GCS Qualification Test Report
text:
# K-200 GCS Qualification Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-402-A. Revision: A. Type: test-report. Author: Felix Herrera. Created: 2024-02-09. Last modified: 2024-05-07. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the GCS subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1152, P-1140.
